contents.text:
Complex command: 
"There is a tree directly in front of the car. Avoid it and then return to the original path."

1. Turn right 90 degrees  
2. Forward (distance enough to clear the tree's width)  
3. Turn left 90 degrees  
4. Forward (distance past the tree)  
5. Turn left 90 degrees  
6. Forward (distance equal to step 2)  
7. Turn right 90 degrees
